final:
module mux5to1 (  
    input wire [4:0] data_in, // 5 input signals  
    input wire [2:0] sel, // 3-bit select line  
    output wire out // Output signal  
);  
    assign out = (sel == 3'b000) ? data_in[0] :  
                 (sel == 3'b001) ? data_in[1] :  
                 (sel == 3'b010) ? data_in[2] :  
                 (sel == 3'b011) ? data_in[3] :  
                 (sel == 3'b100) ? data_in[4] : 1'b0;  
endmodule
